industries_meta.name_zh: 行動 SoC (TSMC 行動客戶)
IC 載板 ABF (HBM 卡點)

eda-ip.summary_zh: EDA/IP 產業營收持續擴張但獲利率普遍承壓。Synopsys Q1'26 營收成長至 $2.4B (+4% QoQ) 但 Ansys 併購拖累 OM 從 23.5% 暴跌至 13.3%,GM 從 80% 降至 73.5%。Cadence 營收穩健成長至 $1.5B,維持 85%+ 高毛利但 OM 從 33.8% 壓縮至 29.3%,連四季 EPS 超標 +4-8%。Arm 憑 AI 伺服器 CPU 需求創紀錄營收 $1.2B,維持 97.6% 超高毛利。Keysight 營收成長緩慢 ($1.3B→$1.6B),OM 徘徊 15-17%。Rambus 連四季零成長卡在 $0.2B,Q1 EPS miss -1% 引發股價暴跌 -21%。
eda-ip.summary_en: EDA/IP sector shows revenue expansion with widespread margin pressure. Synopsys Q1'26 revenue grew +4% QoQ to $2.4B but Ansys integration crushed OM from 23.5% to 13.3%, GM fell from 80% to 73.5%. Cadence maintained steady growth to $1.5B with 85%+ GM but OM compressed 440bps to 29.3% despite four consecutive EPS beats +4-8%. Arm achieved record $1.2B revenue driven by AI server CPU demand with exceptional 97.6% GM. Keysight showed sluggish growth ($1.3B→$1.6B) with 15-17% OM volatility. Rambus stagnated at $0.2B for four straight quarters, Q1 EPS miss -1% triggered -21% stock crash.
key_datapoints_zh: Synopsys OM 從 23.5% 崩至 13.3%,Ansys 併購拖累 GM 降至 73.5%
Cadence 連四季 EPS 超標 +4-8%,營收穩步成長至 $1.5B 但 OM 壓縮 440bps
Arm 營收 $1.2B 創高,維持 97.6% 超高毛利,AI 伺服器 CPU 驅動強勁
eda-ip.implication_for_tsmc_zh: EDA/IP 廠商獲利壓力反映產業整合成本與投資週期,但 Arm AI 伺服器動能與 Cadence 持續超標顯示先進製程設計需求強勁,支撐 TSMC N3/N2 客戶擴張
eda-ip.implication_for_tsmc_en: Margin compression reflects integration costs and investment cycles, but Arm's AI server momentum and Cadence's consistent beats signal robust advanced-node design demand supporting TSMC N3/N2 customer expansion.

wfe.common_theme_zh: AI晶片複雜化驅動高階設備需求
wfe.common_theme_en: AI chip complexity drives premium tool demand
wfe.summary_zh: 晶圓製造設備廠商呈現分化：應用材料連四季EPS超預期3.5-7.9%，Q1營收達$70億、毛利率49%；科林研發Q1營收躍升10%至$58億、營益率回升至35%；愛德萬Q4 EPS大勝27.5%、全年營收¥1.13兆受惠AI/HBM測試；ASM國際Q1營收成長16%至$0.9B、營益率創新高33.1%；但ASML營收從$97億降至$88億、營益率從40.8%壓縮至36%，中國出口管制持續施壓；Lasertec突然轉負、EPS miss達-29.5%顯示EUV光罩檢測需求波動；整體顯示先進封裝、ALD沉積、測試設備受AI驅動強勁，但光刻設備受地緣政治拖累。
wfe.summary_en: WFE sector shows bifurcation: Applied Materials delivered four consecutive EPS beats (+3.5% to +7.9%), Q1 revenue $7.0B with 49% GM; Lam Research Q1 revenue jumped 10% to $5.8B, OM rebounded to 35%; Advantest Q4 beat +27.5%, FY revenue ¥1.13T driven by AI/HBM test demand; ASM International Q1 revenue surged 16% to $0.9B with record 33.1% OM; but ASML revenue declined from $9.7B to $8.8B, OM compressed from 40.8% to 36% amid China export controls; Lasertec abruptly missed EPS by -29.5%, signaling EUV mask inspection volatility. Advanced packaging (BESI orders doubled to €200M), ALD deposition, and test equipment show AI-driven strength, while lithography faces geopolitical headwinds.
key_datapoints_zh: 應用材料/科林研發/Teradyne連四季EPS超預期，Q1營益率達29.9%/35.0%/37.1%，AI晶片製程設備需求強勁
ASML營收QoQ降9%至$88億、營益率從40.8%壓縮至36%，中國出口管制影響EUV/DUV出貨動能
ASM國際Q1營益率創紀錄33.1%、Advantest Q4 EPS勝27.5%，先進封裝ALD與AI測試設備成長爆發
wfe.implication_for_tsmc_zh: 先進封裝、高階測試設備供應鏈強勁支撐TSMC 3nm/2nm產能擴張，但EUV設備交期與成本受地緣政治風險壓力，需分散供應鏈並加速CoWoS良率提升
wfe.implication_for_tsmc_en: Strong advanced packaging and test equipment supply chain supports TSMC 3nm/2nm ramp, but EUV delivery/cost risks from geopolitics require supply diversification and accelerated CoWoS yield improvement

foundries.common_theme_zh: 成熟製程分化,先進製程受壓
foundries.summary_zh: 晶圓代工業呈現雙速分化:三星Q4營收衝上₩93.8兆(+26% QoQ)、毛利率飆至47.2%(+880bps),英特爾Q1毛利率回升至39.4%但仍虧$3.73B,聯電Q1營收持平$61B、毛利率壓縮至29.2%,格芯Q1營收衰退11%至$1.6B、營益率跌至11.0%。中國陣營承壓:中芯連四季EPS負成長(-19%~-33%)、華虹連四季嚴重虧損(-88%~-57%)、力積電連四季負毛利率且Q4營益率-5.8%。成熟製程專業廠分化:高塔四季連續超越預期、毛利率擴張630bps至26.7%,世界先進營收+8% QoQ但毛利率壓縮至27.5%。
foundries.summary_en: Foundry sector shows stark two-speed divergence: Samsung Q4 revenue surged 26% QoQ to ₩93.8T with GM expanding 880bps to 47.2%; Intel Q1 GM recovered to 39.4% yet posted $3.73B net loss; UMC Q1 revenue flat at $61B with GM compressing to 29.2%; GFS Q1 revenue declined 11% to $1.6B with OM falling to 11.0%. Chinese foundries face systemic stress: SMIC four consecutive quarters of negative EPS growth (-19% to -33%), Hua Hong four straight severe EPS misses (-88% to -57%), Powerchip four quarters of negative GM with Q4 OM at -5.8%. Mature-node specialists bifurcate: Tower beat EPS four quarters straight with GM expanding 630bps to 26.7%; VIS revenue +8% QoQ but GM compressed to 27.5%.
key_datapoints_zh: 三星Q4毛利率47.2%創四季新高(vs Q1 35.5%),營益率21.4%為聯電(18.4%)1.16倍
中國三廠(中芯/華虹/力積電)連四季虧損或負成長,力積電營益率-5.8%、華虹EPS miss -57%
成熟製程廠毛利率差距擴大:高塔26.7% vs 世界先進27.5% vs 格芯27.6%,但營益率高塔16.1%遠勝格芯11.0%
foundries.implication_for_tsmc_zh: 先進製程領先優勢擴大(三星記憶體拉抬、英特爾18A仍無外部客戶),成熟製程競爭白熱化需以技術差異化維持定價權,中國受制裁加劇利於TSMC份額鞏固
foundries.implication_for_tsmc_en: Leading-edge gap widens (Samsung memory-driven, Intel 18A lacks external wins); mature-node pricing pressure demands tech differentiation; China sanctions intensify TSMC share consolidation opportunity

ai-gpu-fabless.summary_zh: 五大 AI 晶片廠商展現強勁成長動能：輝達營收飆升 54% 達 $68.1B、毛利率擴張至 75%，連四季 EPS 超預期；超微營收增 12% 至 $10.3B、營業利益率從 13.7% 躍升至 17.1%，Q4 EPS 超預期 16%；博通營收四季成長 28.7% 至 $19.3B、營業利益率從 38.1% 擴至 44.9%；邁威爾營收成長 15.8% 至 $2.2B、營業利益率從 13.6% 升至 18.7%；Astera Labs 維持 76% 毛利率、連四季 EPS 超預期 13-36%。五家公司分析師評級 194 買進 vs 29 持有 vs 2 賣出，反映 AI 基礎建設需求強勁且利潤率持續擴張。
ai-gpu-fabless.summary_en: Five AI chip leaders demonstrate explosive growth: NVIDIA revenue surged 54% to $68.1B with GM expanding to 75% and four consecutive EPS beats (+5.3% latest); AMD revenue up 12% to $10.3B with OM leaping from 13.7% to 17.1% and Q4 EPS beat of +16%; Broadcom revenue accelerated 28.7% across four quarters to $19.3B with OM expanding from 38.1% to 44.9%; Marvell revenue grew 15.8% to $2.2B with OM rising from 13.6% to 18.7%; Astera Labs maintained 76% GM with four straight EPS beats of 13-36%. Collective analyst ratings show 194 BUY vs 29 HOLD vs 2 SELL, reflecting robust AI infrastructure demand and sustained margin expansion across the ecosystem.
key_datapoints_zh: 輝達營收四季飆升 $44.1B→$68.1B (+54%)、毛利率從 60.5% 擴至 75%，營業利益率從 49.1% 升至 65%
超微 Q4 營業利益率從 13.7% 躍升至 17.1%、毛利率擴張 260bps 至 54.3%，EPS 超預期 16%
博通四季營收從 $15B 增至 $19.3B (+28.7%)、營業利益率從 38.1% 擴至 44.9%，連四季 EPS 超預期
ai-gpu-fabless.implication_for_tsmc_zh: AI 算力需求強勁，客戶利潤率擴張顯示先進製程定價空間充足，輝達 25% 營收占比帶來產能壓力與議價優勢並存，需平衡產能配置
ai-gpu-fabless.implication_for_tsmc_en: Robust AI compute demand with customer margin expansion validates advanced node pricing power; NVDA's 25% revenue share creates capacity tension and negotiation leverage requiring strategic capacity allocation balance

mobile-soc.common_theme_zh: 高階獨占 vs. 大眾市場壓縮
mobile-soc.common_theme_en: Premium monopoly vs. volume margin collapse
mobile-soc.summary_zh: 行動 SoC 呈現極端分化：Apple 獨享 TSMC N3/N2 製程，連續四季 EPS 超預期 +3.5~10.1%，毛利率擴張 280bps 至 49.3%，營運利益率穩居 30-35% 菁英區；Qualcomm 營收季減 14% 至 $10.6B，毛利率連四季壓縮至 53.8%，指引未達標但 EPS 仍超 +3.6%；MediaTek 毛利率從 Q2 49.1% 崩至 Q4 46.1%，營運利益率腰斬至 14.5%，淨利季減 22%、EPS 負驚喜 -5%，大眾市場價格戰激烈。
mobile-soc.summary_en: Mobile SoC bifurcates sharply: Apple monopolizes TSMC N3/N2, delivering 4 straight EPS beats +3.5~10.1%, gross margin expanded 280bps to 49.3%, operating margin held elite 30-35% range. Qualcomm revenue fell 14% QoQ to $10.6B, gross margin compressed 4th consecutive quarter to 53.8%, guidance missed yet EPS beat +3.6%. MediaTek margins collapsed—GM from Q2 49.1% to Q4 46.1%, OM halved to 14.5%, net income down 22% QoQ, EPS miss -5%—reflecting brutal volume-tier price war amid stable $150B revenue.
key_datapoints_zh: Apple 毛利率四季擴張 280bps 至 49.3%，營運利益率守 30-35%，EPS 連四季超預期 +3.5~10.1%
Qualcomm 營收季減 14% 至 $10.6B，毛利率連四季收窄至 53.8%，指引未達標但 EPS 仍超 +3.6%
MediaTek 毛利率從 Q2 49.1% 崩至 Q4 46.1%，營運利益率腰斬至 14.5%，淨利季減 22%、EPS 負驚喜 -5%
mobile-soc.implication_for_tsmc_zh: N3/N2 先進製程客戶集中度極高（Apple 獨占），中階 N4/N5 面臨 MediaTek/Qualcomm 價格戰壓力，需防單一客戶依賴風險並加速開發多元先進製程客群
mobile-soc.implication_for_tsmc_en: N3/N2 revenue concentrates in single client (Apple), mid-tier N4/N5 faces price war (MediaTek/Qualcomm margin collapse), urgently diversify leading-edge customers to mitigate dependency risk

memory.common_theme_zh: HBM 供應緊縮驅動超級週期
memory.summary_zh: 記憶體產業進入 AI 驅動的超級週期,SK 海力士 Q4 營收達 $32.8T KRW(+34% QoQ)、毛利率擴張至 68.8%,美光 Q2 營收 $23.9B、毛利率創紀錄 74.4%,兩大 HBM 龍頭連續 4 季 EPS 超標 20%+;大型科技公司主動提供資金確保 HBM 產能,記憶體價格飆漲限制消費電子供應。台系廠商南亞科 Q1 營收暴增 187% 至 $30.1B、毛利率從負轉正至 49%,華邦電/旺宏連續 3 季獲利改善。
memory.summary_en: Memory sector enters AI-driven supercycle: SK Hynix Q4 revenue surged 34% QoQ to $32.8T KRW with 68.8% GM, Micron Q2 hit record $23.9B revenue with 74.4% GM; both HBM leaders delivered 4 consecutive quarters of 20%+ EPS beats. Big tech firms proactively offering production funding to secure HBM supply, driving unprecedented memory price surge constraining consumer electronics. Taiwan players show sharp recovery: Nanya Q1 revenue soared 187% to $30.1B with GM recovering to 49% from deep negatives, Winbond/Macronix achieved 3 consecutive quarters of profitability improvement.
key_datapoints_zh: SK 海力士與美光連續 4 季 EPS 超標 20%+,Q4/Q2 毛利率分別達 68.8%/74.4%,HBM 供應緊張推動定價權
南亞科 Q1 營收 $30.1B(+187% YoY)、毛利率從 -20.6% 回升至 49%,DRAM 價格復甦驅動利潤率擴張
威騰電子連續 4 季 EPS 超標 10%+、毛利率擴張 920bps 至 50.2%,AI 資料中心儲存需求推動股價漲 170%
memory.implication_for_tsmc_zh: HBM/AI 記憶體需求爆發創造先進封裝(CoWoS)產能瓶頸,TSMC 需加速 3D 堆疊與矽中介層技術擴產以支撐客戶 HBM 整合需求
memory.implication_for_tsmc_en: HBM/AI memory demand explosion creates advanced packaging (CoWoS) capacity bottleneck; TSMC must accelerate 3D stacking and silicon interposer expansion to support customer HBM integration requirements

silicon-materials.common_theme_zh: 矽晶圓崩盤 特化材料撐場
silicon-materials.summary_zh: 矽晶圓三巨頭全面潰敗:信越 Q4 EPS -10.9%、勝高連二季虧損(Q4 -51.6%/Q3 -109.4%)、環球晶毛利率壓縮 430bps 至 25.7%、世創毛利率崩至 -8.5% 虧損 $0.06B。特化材料分化:東京應化連四季大幅超標(+11%~+65%)主導 EUV 光阻、Entegris Q1 毛利率擴至 46.9% EPS +15.4%、富士連三季超標;工業氣體停滯,Linde 營收持平 $8.8B 毛利率壓縮 80bps、Air Products 營運利潤率縮 190bps 至 23.7%。
silicon-materials.summary_en: Silicon wafer sector in free fall: Shin-Etsu Q4 EPS miss -10.9%, SUMCO consecutive losses (Q4 -51.6%/Q3 -109.4%), GlobalWafers GM compressed 430bps to 25.7%, Siltronic GM collapsed to -8.5% with -$0.06B loss. Specialty materials bifurcated: Tokyo Ohka four straight massive beats (+11% to +65%) leading EUV photoresist, Entegris Q1 GM expanded to 46.9% with +15.4% EPS beat, Fujifilm three consecutive beats; industrial gases stagnant with Linde revenue flat at $8.8B and GM down 80bps, Air Products OM contracted 190bps to 23.7% despite consistent beats.
key_datapoints_zh: 矽晶圓產能過剩:世創毛利率 -8.5%、勝高 Q4 虧損擴大至 -51.6%、環球晶營收季減 9%
EUV 光阻獨強:東京應化連四季超標 +11%~+65%、Entegris 毛利率擴張至 46.9%
工業氣體停滯:Linde 營收持平 $8.8B、Air Products 營運利潤率縮 190bps 至 23.7%
silicon-materials.implication_for_tsmc_zh: 晶圓產能過剩壓低成本但 EUV 材料價格堅挺,先進製程毛利率承壓,需加速 2nm 良率提升分攤材料成本
silicon-materials.implication_for_tsmc_en: Wafer oversupply lowers costs but EUV material pricing stays firm, pressuring advanced-node margins; urgently accelerate 2nm yield to amortize material expenses.

osat.summary_zh: OSAT 產業呈兩極走勢:日月光 Q1'26 營收 $173.7B、毛利率 20.1%、連三季 EPS 超標 13-18%,力成 Q4'25 營收飆 25% 至 $21.4B、毛利率 18.6%,南茂 Q4 營收倍增至 $12.1B;但艾克爾營收季減 11% 至 $1.7B、毛利率壓縮至 14.2%,長電營收季減 10.8% 至 $9.2B、淨利腰斬至 $0.29B,京元電營收雖成長 7.5% 至 $10B、毛利率 37.7%,但 EPS 不如預期、淨利季減。領導廠商受惠高階封裝與記憶體復甦,二線廠商面臨需求疲軟與利潤壓力。
osat.summary_en: OSAT sector shows stark bifurcation: ASE posted $173.7B Q1'26 revenue with 20.1% GM and three consecutive 13-18% EPS beats; Powertech surged 25% QoQ to $21.4B revenue with 18.6% GM; ChipMOS doubled revenue to $12.1B. Conversely, Amkor declined 11% QoQ to $1.7B with GM compressed to 14.2%; JCET dropped 10.8% to $9.2B with NI halved to $0.29B; King Yuan grew 7.5% to $10B with 37.7% GM but missed EPS with declining NI $2.25B vs $2.30B. Leaders capitalize on advanced packaging and memory recovery while tier-two players face demand softness and margin pressure.
key_datapoints_zh: 日月光毛利率從 17% 擴張至 20.1%,連三季營運利潤率改善至 10.1%,EPS 超標幅度 13-18%
力成 Q4 營收季增 25% 達 $21.4B、毛利率 18.6%、營運利潤率 12.6%,記憶體封裝需求強勁復甦
艾克爾營收季減 11% 至 $1.7B、毛利率壓縮 250bp 至 14.2%,長電淨利腰斬至 $0.29B
osat.implication_for_tsmc_zh: 高階封裝(CoWoS/InFO)需求兩極化,TSMC 應聚焦頂級客戶與先進製程協同封裝,避開商品化產能戰
osat.implication_for_tsmc_en: Advanced packaging demand polarizes; TSMC must prioritize tier-1 synergies and avoid commoditized capacity battles in OSAT space

hyperscalers.common_theme_zh: AI資本支出推動營收成長，但獲利率承壓
hyperscalers.common_theme_en: AI capex drives revenue, margin pressure emerges
hyperscalers.summary_zh: 五大雲端巨頭Q1'26合計營收$447.8B (+8% YoY)，但獲利率分化嚴重：微軟營業利益率從48.9%壓縮至46.3% (-260bp)，甲骨文毛利率從70.2%驟降至64.6% (-560bp)，Meta毛利率穩守81-82%但Q3'25淨利暴跌至$2.71B (-84.3% EPS miss)顯示AI基礎建設投資拖累。亞馬遜AWS需求強勁帶動Q1'26營業利益率擴張至13.1%、EPS驚喜+68%；Google Q1'26 EPS暴增+91.6%但營收QoQ衰退3.4%至$109.9B，記憶體短缺威脅TPU邊際效益。甲骨文裁員2-3萬人凸顯成本結構失控，儘管OCI營收年增15%至$17.2B。
hyperscalers.summary_en: Five hyperscalers generated $447.8B combined Q1'26 revenue (+8% YoY), but margin bifurcation intensifies: Microsoft's operating margin compressed 260bp (48.9%→46.3%), Oracle's gross margin plunged 560bp (70.2%→64.6%), Meta's stable 81-82% GM masks Q3'25 net income collapse to $2.71B (-84.3% EPS miss) from AI infrastructure drag. Amazon AWS demand drove 13.1% operating margin (+140bp QoQ) with massive 68% EPS beat. Google's 91.6% Q1'26 EPS surprise offset 3.4% QoQ revenue decline to $109.9B; memory shortage threatens GCP/TPU margins. Oracle laid off 20-30K despite 15% OCI revenue growth to $17.2B, exposing cost structure crisis amid AI pivot.
key_datapoints_zh: 亞馬遜Q1'26營業利益率13.1% (QoQ +140bp)、EPS驚喜+68%，AWS需求最強勁
微軟與甲骨文毛利率分別壓縮至67.6% (-260bp) 與64.6% (-560bp)，AI投資侵蝕獲利
Google營收$109.9B (QoQ -3.4%) 但EPS暴增+91.6%，記憶體短缺威脅TPU擴張

substrates.summary_en: ABF substrate sector shows stark AI/legacy bifurcation: Unimicron capitalized on NVIDIA AI demand with Q4 revenue hitting $34.7B, GM expanding 270bp to 15.8%, and NI surging 117x to $3.53B, delivering 48-50% EPS beats for two consecutive quarters. Nan Ya PCB confirmed inflection with Q4 revenue jumping 42% to $11.2B, GM recovering to 12.5%, and OM turning positive to 8.6% after 25% EPS beat. Conversely, Intel-exposed Ibiden missed Q4 EPS by 13.5% amid declining earnings, while Kinsus badly missed 2026Q1 EPS estimates by 24.6% despite maintaining 22.1% GM. Data confirms two-speed growth: AI-driven players accelerating sharply while legacy CPU/server substrate suppliers face demand softness.
